title: Grakko
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Bounty hunter |image=[[File:Grakko.jpg]] |name=Grakko |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] (13:6 GrS), [[The Wheel/Legends|''The Wheel'']] |species=[[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Blue]] |skin=Orange |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Zenex]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Hey, Grakko. Umm. Let me pass…for old time's sake?"
"''Love'' to. ''Can't''. Job specifically requires you dead. You're a nice thief, but you must die now.|[[Khaleen Hentz/Legends|Khaleen Hentz]] and Grakko|[[Republic 49|''Republic'' 49]]}} '''Grakko''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] who worked for the [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Zenex]] on [[The Wheel/Legends|''the Wheel'']] [[Space station/Legends|space station]]. ==Biography== Grakko was tasked with killing [[Khaleen Hentz/Legends|Khaleen Hentz]], whom he had encountered at some point in the past, after she had stolen an important [[Hologram disc/Legends|holodisc]] from Zenex. Grakko caught up with her on the [[maintenance level]]s of The Wheel, where they engaged in a brief fight. The fight ended when Khaleen set off a detonator that was still attached to Grakko's utility belt. Grakko was killed in the explosion. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Republic 49|''Republic'' 49]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{FactFile|121|HEN 1-4|Khaleen Hentz}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Grakko |fr=Grakko |pl=Grakko }} [[Category:Bounty hunters]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Mercenaries]] [[Category:Quarren]]
